risks: High risk: yard cross-operation may delay schedule and restrict working window.
Medium risk: spare parts waiting may interrupt execution progress.
Medium risk: onsite safety approval or hot work restriction may affect execution arrangement.
pending_confirmations: Confirm whether HPS/HCU accumulator repair kits are owner supply or our supply.
Confirm whether FIVA valves pilot valves are owner supply or our supply.
Confirm whether fuel booster unit components are owner supply or our supply.
Confirm whether MPC and UPS batteries are owner supply or our supply.
Confirm drydock yard, exact service window and cross-operation arrangement.
Confirm hot work / enclosed space / high pressure safety approval conditions.
assumptions: Current evaluation report is for quotation preparation only and final execution depends on onboard and yard condition.
Spare parts supply responsibility remains to be confirmed.
Drydock location is within China central or south region.

special_terms: Payment within 30 days upon invoice date.
All evaluation data is for quotation preparation only and actual execution is subject to site condition.
Other repair and extra scope if needed to be charged extra.
